tool.name: Reduction
tool.command: ln -s $output_dir output && export HOME=/root && ln -s $data_dir /app/data && echo "running reduction..." && pixi run --as-is --manifest-path /app python /app/scripts/mantid/simple_reduction.py --event-file $input_file --template $template_file --output-dir output > >(tee -a $output) 2> >(tee -a $output >&2) && ls output/ && run_number=\$(cat output/.last_reduced_set) && echo \$run_number && cp output/REFL_\${run_number}_combined_data_auto.txt $reflectivity
